title: Compression Springs Assortment Kit, 300PCS 304 Stainless Steel Small Spring Set for DIY Repair Project 23 Different Sizes Mechanical Metal Mini Spring For DIY, Home, Automotive Repairs
features: 【Durable Material】Crafted from 304 stainless steel, these compression springs resist rust, ensuring long-term reliability in humid environments. Ideal for automotive repairs and outdoor tools, their smooth surface enhances flexibility while maintaining structural integrity.

【Organized Storage Solution】All 23 sizes of mechanical springs are neatly compartmentalized in a clear, labeled plastic box for quick identification. The portable design simplifies storage and accessibility, making it perfect for workshops, garages, or on-the-go DIY projects.

【Multi-Purpose Versatility】Designed for diverse applications, these stainless steel springs suit doors, bicycles, electronics, toys, and vintage appliances. Their precise dimensions (wire diameter: 0.011"-0.027", length: 0.39"-1.18") ensure compatibility with 3D printers, pliers, curtains, and more.

【Precision Size Range】With 23 standardized sizes, this kit covers compression needs for delicate electronics to heavy-duty automotive components. Each spring undergoes rigorous load testing for consistent performance.

【Reliable Manufacturing Quality】Engineered through precise calculations and CNC machining, these mechanical springs deliver uniform compression force. Lab-tested for durability, they meet requirement for shop repairs, tool maintenance, and hobbyist projects.
